description: Converts a Flow Cytometry Standard (FCS) file to a Comma Separated Values (CSV) file.
author: Josef Spidlen, BC Cancer Agency
plan:
## FcsToCsv GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
FcsToCsv is a GenePattern module that Converts a Flow Cytometry Standard (FCS) file to a Comma Separated Values (CSV) file.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 7 parameters:
- Required: Input.FCS.data.file, Output.CSV.file.name, Output.keywords.file.name
- Optional: Use.full.names, Output.keywords.mode, Channel.to.scale.conversion, Precision

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -jar <libdir>fcs2csv.jar <Input.FCS.data.file> <Output.CSV.file.name> <Use.full.names> <Output.keywords.file.name> <Output.keywords.mode> <Channel.to.scale.conversion> <Precision>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Input.FCS.data.file
parameters.description: An FCS data file to be converted to CSV.

parameters.name: Output.CSV.file.name
parameters.description: The name of the output CSV file.

parameters.name: Use.full.names
parameters.description: Whether to try to extract full parameter names from the FCS file.

parameters.name: Output.keywords.file.name
parameters.description: The file name to store keyword value pairs extracted from the FCS file.

choices.display: Store as a CSV file, default
Store keywords in the FCS TEXT segment format
Do not extract the keyword/value pairs

parameters.name: Channel.to.scale.conversion
parameters.description: Whether to convert log channel values to linear scale.

choices.display: No conversion, store as in the FCS file

parameters.name: Precision
parameters.description: Whether to use regular (32bit, recommended) or double precision.
